title: 5 Large Postage Bags 24"x 36" Extra Strong Polythene Grey Mail Envelopes for Packaging Clothes Parcel Self Seal Storage Bags
features: ✅ LARGE POSTAGE/ STORAGE BAGS - 24" x 36" (61cm x 92 cm) - allows to put inside large items like pillows, blankets, clothes or hand luggage size 22" x 18" x 10" (56 x 45 x 25 cm)

✅  SELF ADHESIVE CLOSING - These mailing bags incorporate a permanent self-seal closure with strong all season glue. Just pack your contents, peel and then seal, done!   The bag is permanently closed.   Fast and secure!

✅ WATERPROOF AND STRONG  - Strong and durable material is hard to tear and waterproof, which protects your shipment perfectly. In addition, the plastic is odourless, so you can send clothes or other items with high odour absorption in it.

✅ LIGHTWEIGHT- Extremely lightweight allowing you to minimise postal costs. Produced using co-extrusion technology and manufactured from 50-60 microns thickness (220 -240 gauge). Compresses 3 layers of polythene film into one making them very robust, opaque, and durable.
✅ MULTIPURPOSE- Ideal for business and private use, to mail out your goods and items, to your customers, family or friends, in a safe and secure way. Also perfect for storage.
description: Product Description Premium Quality Mailing & Rubble Bags STRONG AND DURABLE Strong and durable material is hard to tear and waterproof, which protects your shipment perfectly. In addition, the plastic is odourless, so you can send clothes or other items with high odour absorption in it. SELF ADHESIVE CLOSING SELF ADHESIVE CLOSING - These mailing bags incorporate a permanent self-seal closure with strong all season glue. Just pack your contents, peel and then seal, done! The bag is permanently closed. Fast and secure! THOUGHTFUL DESIGN Mailing bags, designed with features for secure shipping. The thoughtful design ensures a secure closure, preventing damage or loss. Our bags are made with durable materials, shielding against water damage. Additionally, the non-see-through feature gives privacy and confidentiality. Ideal for businesses and individuals, our mailing bags redefine shipping excellence, ensuring your packages arrive in perfect condition. Trust us to revolutionize your shipping process today! PREMIUM QUALITY Discover our premium quality mailing bags designed to exceed your expectations. With a focus on durability and strength, these bags feature a reliable seal closure that ensures the safety of your shipments. Crafted with the highest quality materials, our bags are built to last, providing long-lasting protection for your items. Trust in our premium quality mailing bags to safeguard your packages with utmost confidence. 35" x 42" HUGE Postal Bag 24" x 36" XXL Postage Bags 22" x 30" XXL Postage Bag 17" x 24" Large Postage Bags 12"x 16"; 10" x 14" ; 9" x 12" ECO Paper Postage Bags Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 5.0 out of 5 stars 3 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,066 4.6 out of 5 stars 341 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,304 4.6 out of 5 stars 111 3.6 out of 5 stars 3 Price — no data £5.29 £ 5 . 29 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £5.69 £ 5 . 69 Size 35" x 42" 24" x 36" 22" x 30" 17" x 24" 12" x16", 10" x 14", 9" x 12" 12" x 16" Capacity Large Luggage Small Cabin Luggage Winter Coat, Pillows, Shoe Box Books, Jumpers, Chocolates no data WE LOVE MOTHER EARTH! Responsibility : Our brand takes responsibility for our environmental impact seriously. We understand the importance of sustainable practices and strive to make a positive difference in the world through our mailing bags. Sustainability: Our commitment to sustainability is unwavering. We prioritize friendly solutions at every stage, from sourcing materials to production and distribution. By choosing our mailing bags, you contribute to a more sustainable future. Made from Recycled Materials : Our mailing bags are proudly made from recycled materials. By giving new life to discarded materials, we reduce waste and minimize the consumption of virgin resources, making a positive impact on the environment. Zero Carbon Emissions: We are dedicated to reducing carbon emissions associated with our products. Our manufacturing processes are designed to minimize energy usage and carbon footprint, ensuring that our mailing bags are friendly from production to delivery. CALZETTE- Brand you can trust Calzette is your trusted partner for high-quality mailing solutions. Born out of a desire for freedom and innovation, we've been providing businesses, entrepreneurs, and individual sellers with reliable mailing bags since 2013. Our Mission: We're on a mission to provide sustainable, top-tier mailing solutions that cater to a wide range of needs. At Calzette , we aim to become the go-to choice for businesses of all sizes, supporting you in delivering your products safely, efficiently, and sustainably. Our Vision: We envision a world where high-quality, friendly mailing solutions are the norm, not the exception. As we expand our product range, we're committed to uphold our standards of quality and sustainability, ensuring every shipment you make contributes positively to a greener, stronger future.
